The product is B2B workflow automation platform. The market is Mid-market SaaS operations teams. Locale is GB. Geographies include United Kingdom and Ireland. Industries include Software and Professional services. Company size is 1000+.

Revenue Operations Manager / Marketing Operations Director
Marketing / Sales / Operations
Director / VP

Titles include Revenue Operations Manager and Marketing Operations Director. Functions include Marketing, Sales, and Operations. Seniorities are Director and VP.
Keywords include workflow automation and revenue operations. Pains include manual handoffs and slow lead follow-up. Triggers include CRM migration and pipeline conversion pressure.

LinkedIn + Microsoft + Google
Campaign goal is Trial demand. Preferred channels include linkedin-ads, microsoft-ads, and google-ads-youtube.
